subcodes.first_line: O thou falcon of the love of God! The time for soaring hath come, and for the unveiling of mysteries, and the hour of utter need and supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای باز هوای محبت الله وقت پرواز است و کشف راز است و هنگام عجز و نیاز است تا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer
